The Apartment

Modern Apartment
in Walkerville, SA

Located within the well-appointed Watson complex at 33 Warwick Street, Walkerville, this one-bedroom apartment offers a comfortable and convenient inner-city lifestyle just 6km from the Adelaide CBD.

The apartment is fully furnished and move-in ready, featuring an open-plan living and dining area with access to a private balcony, a well-equipped kitchen, and a bright bedroom with built-in robe. Split system air conditioning is included throughout.

Suitable for owner-occupiers, professionals or investors looking for a low-maintenance property in a well-connected suburb.

What's Nearby

Walkerville is a well-connected inner suburb of Adelaide, located approximately 6km from the CBD. The area offers convenient access to public transport, local shops, cafés and parks.

Adelaide CBD~6km / 10 min drive
Adelaide Oval~4 min drive
Adelaide Zoo~3 min drive
